positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for monkeypox_positive.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u33,axiom,
    symptom_of(muscle_pains,monkeypox_disease)).

cnf(u32,axiom,
    symptom_of(headache,monkeypox_disease)).

cnf(u35,negated_conjecture,
    ~symptom_of(coughing,monkeypox_disease)).

cnf(u34,axiom,
    symptom_of(tiredness,monkeypox_disease)).

cnf(u31,axiom,
    symptom_of(fever,monkeypox_disease)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define disease(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define symptom(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define has_virus(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define gets_monkeypox(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define animal(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define mammal(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define human(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define gets_flu(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define has_symptom(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
